title: Solar Panel Savings Calculator - ROI & Payback Period
description: Free solar panel savings calculator. Estimate your solar energy savings, payback period, and 25-year ROI based on your electricity usage.
keywords: solar panel calculator, solar savings calculator, solar ROI, solar payback period, solar panel cost
intro: Calculate your potential solar panel savings. Enter your electricity bill and system details to see payback period and long-term savings.

faq.q: How much do solar panels save?
faq.a: Average US homeowners save $1,500-$2,500 per year on electricity with solar panels, or $37,500-$62,500 over 25 years.

faq.q: What is the payback period for solar?
faq.a: The average solar payback period is 6-10 years, after which electricity is essentially free for the remaining 15-20 years.
The federal solar Investment Tax Credit (ITC) provides a 30% tax credit on the total system cost through 2032.
